summary: Centralize PROJECT_ROOT/DB path defaults — every module redefines them, drift-prone

resolution.note: Created guru/paths.py with PROJECT_ROOT, DEFAULT_DB, CONFIG_*, CORPUS_DIR, TAXONOMY_TOML, SCRIPTS_DIR. Refactored guru/{retriever,model,cli,corpus}.py to import from it. Scripts left untouched — they each compute Path(__file__).parent.parent identically and stay self-contained.
